title: Edit Uploaded Photo Male Model Into Semi
sourceTitle: Edit Uploaded Photo Male Model Into Semi

imagePrompts.prompt:
Edit the uploaded photo of a male model into a semi-illustrated street fashion look.
Keep the pose, camera angle, and framing exactly the same.
Illustrate only the jacket and sneakers in bold red, blue, green, yellow, and black color-pop style with clean black outlines.
Add colorful doodle motion strokes.
Face and background remain realistic.
Not full cartoon.
